q:
The first transition element of the 3d series is _______. 2024
A. zinc
B. vanadium
C. scandium
D. titanium

The first transition element of the 3d series is _______. 2024
A. copper
B. nickel
C. scandium
D. vanadium

Iron and _______ are essential metals used in modern medicine. 2024
A. copper
B. manganese
C. cobalt
D. chromium

Transition elements are significantly _______ reactive than Group I metals. 2024
A. more
B. less
C. strong
D. better

The 3d transition series contain elements having the atomic numbers from _______. 2024, 2025
A. 21 to 31
B. 21 to 30
C. 22 to 30
D. 21 to 29

The highest oxidation state is _______ for manganese. 2024
A. +7
B. +2
C. +4
D. +5

The third series 5d transition elements run from lanthanum through _______. 2024
A. cadmium
B. zinc
C. mercury
D. yttrium

_______ is also used in artificial hip bone replacements, and eyeglass frames. 2024
A. Chromium
B. Nickel
C. Titanium
D. Vanadium

A transition metal catalyst, _______, is used in the hydrogenation of alkene. 2024
A. copper
B. iron
C. nickel
D. titanium

The number of unpaired electrons present in Cu⁺ ion is _______. 2024
A. one
B. two
C. zero
D. three

Yttrium and cadmium are _______ transition elements. 2024
A. s-block
B. f-block
C. p-block
D. d-block

The electronic configuration of Fe²⁺ ion is _______. (Given: ₂₆Fe) 2024
A. [Ar] 4s² 3d⁴
B. [Ar] 4s¹ 3d⁵
C. [Ar] 3d⁶
D. [Ar] 3d⁵

The first row of the transition elements is in the _______ row of the Periodic Table. 2024
A. first
B. second
C. third
D. fourth

Transition elements exhibit variable valency because they release electrons from _______ orbitals. 2024
A. ns
B. np
C. (n-1)d
D. (n-1)d & ns

_______ is also used in artificial hip bone replacements and eyeglass frames. 2024
A. Chromium
B. Nickel
C. Titanium
D. Vanadium

_______ pair of transition metals of the 3d series do not show a variable oxidation state. 2024
A. Sc and Zn
B. Ti and V
C. Mn and Cr
D. Fe and Ni

The essential electronic configuration of Zn²⁺ is _______. 2025
A. 3d⁷
B. 3d⁸
C. 3d⁹
D. 3d¹⁰

The 3d series transition elements have _______. 2024
A. low melting points and boiling points
B. catalytic activity
C. no distinctive colour
D. high reactivity with water
a: low melting points and boiling points

q:
In the first series transition metal elements, the _______ orbital is the outermost orbital. 2024
A. 3d
B. 4p
C. 3p
D. 4s

Many transition elements and their compounds act as good _______ for specific reactions. 2024, 2026
A. reactors
B. catalysts
C. inhibitors
D. insulators

In 3d transition series, the element which has the lowest melting point is _______. 2024
A. Sc
B. Cu
C. Ni
D. Zn

In stainless steel, iron is mixed with _______. 2024
A. Cu and Au
B. Cu and Cr
C. Cu and Ni
D. Ni and Cr

Transition metals usually have their _______ oxidation states in compounds with fluorine. 2024, 2026
A. zero
B. lowest
C. medium
D. highest

The essential electronic configuration of the ₂₇Co is _______. 2024
A. 4s² 3d⁶
B. 4s² 3d⁷
C. 4s¹ 3d⁶
D. 3d⁷

In the environment, lead primarily exists in the _______ oxidation states. 2024
A. +3 and +4
B. +1 and +2
C. +2 and +4
D. +3 and +5

_______ steel is extremely strong and is used for railway tracks. 2024
A. Chromium
B. Manganese
C. Vanadium
D. Cobalt

_______ is used to reduce the aromatics and improve the octane rating in gasoline. 2024
A. Manganese
B. Titanium
C. Vanadium
D. Chromium

_______ is used in artificial hip bone replacements, and eyeglass frames. 2024
A. Titanium
B. Nickel
C. Chromium
D. Cobalt

_______ is used to reduce the aromatics and improve the octane rating in gasoline. 2024, 2026
A. Chromium
B. Cobalt
C. Nickel
D. Manganese

In general, transition metals do not _______ readily in the atmosphere. 2024, 2026
A. corrode
B. cornbust
C. neutralise
D. acidity

Copper is used as an electrical wire because it is a good _______ of electricity. 2024
A. conductor
B. insulator
C. thermometer
D. adaptor
